posts.name: Joe W
posts.cooked: Hello, I have a question about the audio input of the Vidiot. I’ve noticed that if I have a patch going from the ear/audio input to anything, it reacts as if it were a square envelope. There is no smooth movement between modulation. However, when I put a patch jack in loosely I can see more interpolation between modulations. I see a smooth transition/envelope for the modulation. I’ve tried turning down my sound source. This doesn’t help. Does anyone else experience this behavior? It doesn’t seem right. I would expect the modulation to reflect the audio input dynamics with a smoother transition between modulations.

posts.name: Chad @ LZX Industries
posts.cooked: It sounds like you might have a jack that is wired backwards. Could you send a message to support@lzxindustries.net ?
